resources.string: This action leads to the decryption of selected encrypted files.

Photos, Videos, Music and Contacts. Theirs copies will be automatically backupped to HiDrive.
Remove deleted and deselected files from backup
Can\'t start AutoBackup. No Play Service available on this device.
This operation will affect folder which is marked as target for automatic upload. Are you sure you want to proceed?
To use auto-upload feature you should select folders first
Can\'t recreate auto-upload folder, folder with the same name already exists
Default auto upload folder was deleted

plurals.name: auto_upload_duplicate_folders_dialog_message
plurals.item: A subfolder in this folder has already been added. To avoid duplication during the upload, the subfolder is removed from the list.
Several subfolders in this folder have already been added. To avoid duplication during the upload, the subfolders are removed from the list.

resources.string: A subfolder in this folder has already been added. To avoid duplication during the upload, the subfolder is removed from the list.
Several subfolders in this folder have already been added. To avoid duplication during the upload, the subfolders are removed from the list.
Your photos will be saved automatically in HiDrive depending on device, month and year.
You can turn on/off the auto-upload in Settings at anytime
Activate the automatic upload for photos or videos here
An error occurred while performing migration. Please try again later.
All files have been moved successfully.
Please choose at least one folder for upload
Auto-Upload folder no longer exist, would you like to recreate the folder?
A parent of this folder already has been added. To avoid duplication during the upload, this folder hasn\'t been added to the list.
An error occurred while preparing auto-upload. Please try again later.
Do you want to continue from the date of a previous successful auto upload or reset the date?
Reset the last auto upload date
Choose the contents of which folder should be automatically uploaded to your HiDrive
"This folder cannot be selected. Please select another folder. "
Protect yourself from losing data and secure your valuable data in HiDrive.
"This backup cannot be restored on an Android device. \n Please download the data via the HiDrive web interface. "
Do you want to get files from \"%s\" on this device?
Backup is already up to date
You must grant permissions to use backup
Some time has passed since you made your last backup
Not enough space on device for restoring backup. Please release some space.
Your device has battery optimization enabled. Please disable the optimization for HiDrive to have a better experience.
The file is broken and cannot be displayed.
Photos and videos are uploaded to the \"%s\" folder
Load your photos to HiDrive automatically
Do you really want to cancel backup-process?
Do you really want to cancel restore-process? %s files have been restored.
The storage space is full. As a result, it is not possible to create a folder.
Files cannot be downloaded to current location
File cannot be downloaded to current location
Folder cannot be updated. We are using the saved information.
This file cannot be opened with any of the installed apps.
An error occurred while saving the photo. Please try again later.
The share link settings could not be accessed.
The share link information could not be loaded.
An encrypted upload directory will become unavailable. Please choose another target upload directory.
Are you sure you want to clear the entire cache?
Some of the selected files are currently being processed, some operations could be temporarily disabled.
The PIN code does not match
An error occurred, please try again later.
Copying files between encrypted folders is not supported
Copying non-encrypted files to encrypted folders is not supported.
Copying encrypted file to non-encrypted folder is not supported
%s of your device will be backed up
%s of your device will be backed up
You need to add backup settings first

This application uses cookies and similar technologies. By clicking on Agree, you consent to the processing of your data and also to its transfer to third parties. Visit our Privacy Policy for more information, also on data processing by third party providers. Click on Reject to prevent use of the tool, or change your selection at any time in Settings.
This data helps us to optimize your user experience and to identify system crashes and bugs.
Data collection is necessary in order to use key functions of the app.

We use software solutions by various partners for this purpose. Our intention is to offer full transparency and allow you to decide how your anonymized data is collected and used. You can also change your settings at any time later on under the Privacy menu item. Please note, however, that data collection contributes significantly to optimizing this app and that you would prevent these improvements by rejecting the transfer of data.
We collect anonymized data to optimize our app.
Do you really want to delete the device backup \"%s\"?
Can\'t delete selected backup. Please, try again later
Do you really want to delete the imported key?
Do you want to remove the password protection?
Are you sure you want to delete this element?
Are you sure you want to delete the password for the share link?

If you do not interact with HiDrive for several months, the operating system hibernates this app. For the proper work of HiDrive, such as downloading files, it is necessary to disable the hibernation. To do this, turn off the flag \"Remove permissions\". Disable hibernation?

If you do not interact with HiDrive for several months, the operating system hibernates this app. For the proper work of HiDrive, such as downloading files, it is necessary to disable the hibernation. To do this, turn off the flag \"%s\". Disable hibernation?
Remove permissions if app isn\'t used
Remove permissions if app isn\'t used
Remove permissions and free up space
The entered password is wrong. Please, try again.
Invitees have the option to add or delete files.
The email address is already in use.
The email address must be a minimum of %d and a maximum of 60 characters in length.
An error occurred during the entry of the email address
For security reasons it is necessary to re-import your key.
"Code could not be scanned. Make sure you have opened the QR code in the HiDrive desktop software and try again. "
Use additional protection for your files and folders with HiDrive-Encryption. Your data can be accessed only with special key.
To have your End-to-end encrypted folders and files on the Desktop also decrypted in the Android app, please import your key via a QR code.
"The key you imported does not match the encrypted files. Please go to the settings, delete the key and import the correct key. "
The encryption key has not been imported

"To have your folder and files encrypted on the Desktop in the Android app decrypted, please scan the QR code of your key. You can create the key you need to encrypt only in your HiDrive desktop software. "

"To have your folder and files encrypted on the Desktop in the Android app decrypted, please scan the QR code of your key. The key and password you need to encrypt is provided by your administrator. "
Please, upgrade your account plan to enable encryption of files and folders.End-to-end encrypted folders and files
"Go to Settings in your HiDrive desktop software. Scan the QR code, which can be displayed under Encryption. "
Please, upgrade your account plan to enable encryption of files and folders.
Incorrect PIN code. Two attempts remaining.
Incorrect PIN code. Four attempts remaining.
Incorrect PIN code. Three attempts remaining.
Please enter the PIN code. Last attempt. \nIf entry is incorrect, you will be logged out automatically of \n
The password is incorrect, please try again
Log in using your biometric credential

1 file successfully copied from cache to selected folder

The process was stopped by the system
Element could not be renamed, as an element with the same name already exists
The name of the folder is too long.
You must accept the General Terms and Conditions.
Uploading the selected files can take a long time and will use a lot of internet traffic. Are you sure you want to continue?

The folder name contains an invalid character
An error occurred while adding the photos. Please try again later.
Insufficient storage space available on HiDrive
An error occurred, please try again later.
Invalid path. Please choose another directory for the upload.
An update has just been downloaded
Please wait a moment until the current process is completed.
The key file can\'t be deleted. You have active running operations.
The keyfile has been successfully deleted
Would you like to logout? Encryption key will be deleted.
You have active running operations. Do you want to cancel them and logout?
You have active running operations. Do you want to cancel them and logout? Your encryption key will be deleted.
Low battery level. Please, charge your device
Not enough space on device for backup creation. Please, create space.
Not enough storage on the device to create the backup. Please increase your disk space.
No wifi network available. Do you want to proceed anyway?
HiDrive requires access to the storage

Moving encrypted file to non-encrypted folder is not supported
Do you want to move all data from %s to %s?

HiDrive needs permission to access your storage and photos

HiDrive needs permission to access your storage
HiDrive needs permission to access the storage
HiDrive needs permission to access your storage
HiDrive needs permission to access the storage

%s (%d%%) of your storage space is in use.

plurals.name: overwrite_favorites_files_message
plurals.item: File %s is present in Offline files. Will be updated
Some files are presented in Offline files, they will be updated

resources.string: Please confirm by entering your PIN once more
"The password contains invalid characters. The password may only contain the following characters: a-z, A-Z (without umlauts), 0-9 and the characters !#$%&()*+,-./:;<>=?@[]^_{|}~ "
The password can have a maximum of 20 characters
The password must contain at least 6 characters
Password length 6-128 characters. The password may only contain the following characters: a-z, A-Z (without umlauts), 0-9 and the characters !#$%&()[]{}*+,-./|:;<>=?@^_~
The password must be a minimum of %d and a maximum of 20 characters in length
Please wait for the annotations to be fully loaded
Enter distance between the two points.
Hold and drag down to delete
Drag to this section to add to action items
Drag to this section to remove from action items
Hold and drag to rearrange action items
Hold and drag to add to action items
Hold and drag tool to change order
If some of the items do not fit in the action items, they will be shown in the overflow menu instead
Thickness will be applied to the next stroke.
An error occurred while creating the screenshot
Can\'t perform searching. Please try again later.
The file can not be displayed
Protect your data from unauthorized access with a PIN code
The file upload pauses when your device changes to the mobile network
Select which folders should be automatically synchronized. Or temporarily suspend the automatic synchronization of individual folders.
Previewing this file is not supported
As the owner, this album is only available to you after login Private albums can not be shared with others
Please wait until the process is complete.
The album is visible to all visitors to your photo gallery
Fetching info about a lot of files…
is necessary for backup and restore
is required to be able to take pictures and scan
is necessary for backup and restore
is required for file saving and backup

An error occurred during activation. Please try again later.
Remote backup is corrupted. Probably some backup is not completed yet.
Please give us permission to show you notifications. You can change the settings at any time in System Preferences
Backup your pictures, videos and contacts in HiDrive.
Would you like to transfer data from \"%s\" to this device?
No wifi network available. Do you want to proceed anyway?
Language files need to be downloaded for creating document with OCR. The document would be created without it if the file is not available.
Not enough space on device for taking photo. Please, clear storage.
Your memory card is not able to record. Unfortunately, the file cannot be saved.
Your search produced too many hits. Only 1000 matches are shown. Please refine your search criteria.
The password has been saved successfully

Share link could not be created due to file uploading failed
Unable to transfer the share link to the third-party application
The share link is no longer valid
The share link has no URL link
Share link still active for %d days
"The share link expires in less than 24 hours "
Please wait for current sharing process to be completed or cancel it.
Sharing a non-encrypted file to an encrypted folder is not supported.

"You will first need to add your key in order to display encrypted content in the directory. Please go to \'Settings\' in the Windows software and select the menu item \'Show keys for mobile devices\'. "
%s Do you want to continue anyway?
The date of the certificate is invalid.
The certificate is not yet valid.
The certificate authority is not trusted.
Streaming to your device is not possible. Would you like to download the file?
%s %s already exists. What would you like to do?
The \"To\" value must be greater or equal to the \"From\" value
An error occurred. Please try again later
Unable to display the selected content.
An error occurred while uploading the file
Please select at least one element to upload.
This file is not valid, it does not contain any web page link, email or phone.
The username is already in use.
The username contains invalid characters. The username can contain only the lower-case letters a-z (without umlauts), the numbers 0-9 and the characters \"-\", \"_\".
The username must be a minimum of %d and a maximum of 40 characters in length.
An error occurred during the entry of the username.
Please wait until the upload is complete
With HiDrive, your files are always close at hand
Share files and folders with your friends
Access your important files, even offline
No write permission for this folder
The security code does not match
